title: Problem to upload a new build

posts.author: raul_silva (Raul Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since yesterday I’m trying to upload a new build for a Feature (Item view) but monday just show the message : “New app feature build upload failed”…

In the console the message show is:

“Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 ()”

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @raul_silva!

Matias here!

Would you be able to please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com so we can take a closer look and give this some following?

Please include in the email if you can, a screen recording of the issue with both the

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
